payload.summary: Schedule Product Hunt only after qualified builder proof is real.
payload.risk: A broad launch before proof would create vanity traffic and weak onboarding signal.

decisionNote: Tighten the demo and include a real issue-to-run-to-calendar path before scheduling.

payload.summary: HN launch packet is close but needs stronger proof.

decisionNote: Approved. Keep the release copy focused on operating agent teams, not generic AI task management.

payload.summary: Release note framing for local desktop build.
payload.approvedCopyAngle: Octopus is a control plane for real agent-work loops.

decisionNote: Rejected. Keep the first 30 founder DMs manually reviewed so the team learns the objection language.

payload.summary: Automate first-touch founder DMs from the growth list.
Octopus Studio exceeded the monthly budget while growth and release runs were both active.
